title: Con Edison, one of Wall Street's oldest stocks, plots new path on Electric Avenue
text: By David Callaway, Callaway Climate Insights By Justin Sharon (Justin Sharon is a longtime freelance writer.

title: CON EDISON REPORTS 2022 FIRST QUARTER EARNINGS
text: NEW YORK , May 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Consolidated Edison, Inc. (Con Edison) (NYSE: ED) today reported 2022 first quarter net income for common stock of $602 million or $1.70 a share compared with $419 million or $1.23 a share in the 2021 first quarter. Adjusted earnings were $522 million or $1.47 a share in the 2022 period compared with $491 million or $1.44 a share in the 2021 period.
